title: Elytra to Crow Wings
description: Turn your Elytra into Crow's Wings!
body:
### ABOUT
This is a small pack made to change Elytra wings into the wings of a Crow. I made this initially to match my Minecraft skin, but have since decided to upload it publicly.

![Elytra re-fashioned as the wings of a crow, alongside their respective item textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3536786dcf269fe8e532fd825fd31177a493625c.png)

---

If you would like an **alternate** version of this pack which remakes Elytra as _Hooded Crow's_ wings instead, you can see that here:
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/elytra-to-hooded-crow-wings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/elytra-to-hooded-crow-wings)
